decisions.decision: All 3 phases in one feature branch
decisions.rationale: Comprehensive upgrade: agent defs, memory, Agent Teams, effort hints
Backward compatibility; /spawn delegates to agent definitions, direct invocation also works

decisions.decision: All agents except docs-writer get persistent memory (project scope, checked in)
decisions.rationale: Maximize institutional knowledge sharing via version control

decisions.decision: Always enabled via CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 in settings.json
decisions.rationale: User wants immediate access; /team command documents experimental status

decisions.decision: Tiered: haiku (explorer, docs), sonnet (reviewer, security, perf, api), inherit (debugger, tests, refactor, migrate)
decisions.rationale: Cost optimization: fast models for read-only, capable models for analysis, full power for implementation

decisions.decision: HTML comment metadata in command .md files (<!-- effort: high -->)
decisions.rationale: Informational guidance, no enforcement; human and Claude can reference

decisions.decision: Dual mode: /sync detects Agent Teams and uses shared task list or falls back to manual
decisions.rationale: Works in both Agent Teams and traditional parallel-session workflows

decisions.decision: 10 agents: explorer, code-reviewer, security-scanner, test-writer, debugger, docs-writer, perf-analyzer, api-reviewer, refactorer, migrate

constraints: install.sh must remain single portable installer
openQuestions: Agent memory file merge conflicts on multi-developer teams
Whether /team creates TEAM.md artifact for session tracking
TeammateIdle/TaskCompleted hook implementations need Agent Teams usage data
Whether to add CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE to settings.json
